The '''People's Liberation Battalion''' was a revolutionary front on [[Eiattu 6]] aimed at overthrowing the [[Priamsta]]. It was led by a [[Harrandatha Estillo (impostor)|man]] claiming to be [[Harrandatha Estillo|Prince Harran]]. Their goals were to destroy the Priamsta and then redistribute wealth to common people.

[[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Ashaad]] was a member of the Battalion.
